title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. lepidellum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. lepidellum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. lepidellum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
